_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical notes detailing examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, follow-up visit details, investigations, Planned line of treatment

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case paper along with treatment details
Post treatment LFT (Liver function test), Serum Bilirubin

ppd_preauth.q: Is the detailed planned line of treatment mentioned in admission note?
Does it show elevated plasma aminotransferase, serum bilirubin and alkaline phosphatase?

cpd_claim.q: Is the detailed Indoor case paper with daily vitals and line of treatment submitted?
Is the discharge summary submitted with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Serum bilirubin level not documented or documented below 2.5 mg/dl without justification.
Serum aminotransferase not documented or documented below 400U/L without justification.
Clinical notes or detailed planned line of treatment not clearly mentioned in admission note.
LFT and serum bilirubin reports not submitted at pre-authorization.
Detailed Indoor case paper with daily vitals or line of treatment missing at claim submission.
Discharge summary missing or lacking follow-up advice at claim submission.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MD / DNB equivalent (in General Medicine, Pediatric Medicine)
clinical_key_pointers: Dark urine, yellow tint to sclera and clay colored stool may be noticed from 1-5 days
